title: T-007 — Hold release Server Action + e-signature (09-a-02)
prompt:
# T-007 — Hold release Server Action + e-signature

PRD: 09-QUALITY-PRD.md §5.3 signature flow, §11.1 V-QA-HOLD-005..007, §13.2 e-signature, §12.1 outbox quality.hold.released
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Implement Server Action `releaseQualityHold(input)` that transitions a quality_holds.hold_status to 'released', sets released_by/released_at/release_signature_hash/release_notes, requires PIN re-verification per §13.2, enforces SoD for critical priority (V-QA-HOLD-006), and emits quality.hold.released outbox event.

## Implementation contract
1. `apps/web/src/server/quality/releaseHold.ts` exports the Server Action with Zod schema validating disposition NOT NULL (V-QA-HOLD-005), pin_proof present, release_notes min 10 chars.
2. SoD check (V-QA-HOLD-006): if hold.priority='critical' then released_by_user_id != hold.created_by_user_id; reject with 403 SoD violation.
3. Signature hash computation server-side per §13.2 (SHA-256 of user_id || hold.id || 'quality_holds' || signed_at_iso || record_content_hash || pin_proof). NEVER trust client hash.
4. Update quality_holds set hold_status='released', released_*; cascade quality_hold_items.item_status='released'; emit quality.hold.released outbox event in same TX.

## Files
- apps/web/src/server/quality/releaseHold.ts [create]
- apps/web/src/server/quality/__tests__/releaseHold.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given a hold with priority='critical' and created_by=U1, when releaseQualityHold is called by U1 with valid pin_proof, then it rejects with V-QA-HOLD-006 SoD error and writes nothing
2. Given a hold with priority='medium' created_by=U1 and the caller is U2 with a valid pin_proof, when releaseQualityHold runs, then quality_holds.hold_status='released', release_signature_hash is non-null and matches the server-computed SHA-256, and a quality.hold.released outbox event is queued
3. Given a payload missing disposition, when releaseQualityHold runs, then it rejects with V-QA-HOLD-005 and writes nothing
4. Given a pin_proof older than 60s, when releaseQualityHold runs, then it rejects with PIN_PROOF_EXPIRED and writes nothing

pipeline_inputs.description: Server Action releaseQualityHold with PIN re-verify, SoD guard, server-computed SHA-256 signature, cascade item status update, outbox event.
pipeline_inputs.details: Server Action validates disposition + pin_proof + release_notes via Zod. SoD check rejects same-user release on priority=critical. Signature hash computed server-side per §13.2 formula; client never sends a hash. TX updates quality_holds, cascades quality_hold_items.item_status, inserts outbox event quality.hold.released. PIN proof TTL 60s enforced.
out_of_scope: Do not implement audit trigger for the release (T-009)
Do not build the release modal UI (T-016)
acceptance_criteria: Given a critical hold created_by=U1, when releaseQualityHold is called by U1 with valid pin_proof, then it rejects with V-QA-HOLD-006 SoD error and writes nothing

Given a medium hold created_by=U1 and caller=U2 with valid pin_proof, when releaseQualityHold runs, then quality_holds.hold_status='released', release_signature_hash equals the server-computed SHA-256, and a quality.hold.released outbox event is queued
Given a payload missing disposition, when releaseQualityHold runs, then it rejects with V-QA-HOLD-005 and writes nothing
Given a pin_proof older than 60s, when releaseQualityHold runs, then it rejects with PIN_PROOF_EXPIRED and writes nothing
test_strategy: RED: write apps/web/src/server/quality/__tests__/releaseHold.test.ts asserting all 4 ACs against fakes before implementation
risk_red_lines: Do not compute signature_hash on the client
Do not allow same-user release on priority=critical (§2.3 SoD)
Do not skip PIN re-verification (21 CFR Part 11 non-compliance otherwise)
